---
title: "Meta-analysis and the science of research synthesis"
author: 
- Gurevitch
- Koricheva
- Nakagawa
- et al.
publication: "Nature, **555**, 175–182 (2018)"
categories: 
  - external-publication
  - pharmacology
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/nature25753
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nature"
issue: 555
page: 175–182
year: 2018
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/nature25753
---
